description: Rename cameras in the Nx Witness VMS system (https://localhost:7001, credentials: admin / Admin1234!) to follow the corporate naming convention `BLDG-FLOOR-ZONE-SEQ`. Map 'Parking Lot Camera' to 'HQ-EXT-PKG-01', 'Entrance Camera' to 'HQ-1F-ENT-01', 'Server Room Camera' to 'HQ-B1-SVR-01', 'Lobby Camera' (if present) to 'HQ-1F-LBY-01', and 'Loading Dock Camera' (if present) to 'HQ-EXT-LDK-01'. Ensure no cameras retain their old informal names.
